title: Hurry Sundown
writer: Horton Foote, Bert Gilden, Katya Gilden
actors: Michael Caine, Jane Fonda, John Phillip Law
plot: Drama of a ruthless Southern opportunist who tries to buy his cousin's land, and when thwarted, brings several tragedies to the lives of his loved ones.
awards: Won 1 BAFTA Award1 win & 2 nominations total
